query: SELECT p.name AS produit, pv.name AS variante, pv.stockQuantity AS stock, pv.inTransitQuantity AS transit, pv.supplierProductCode AS code_fournisseur, pv.ean13 FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId ORDER BY pv.stockQuantity DESC, pv.inTransitQuantity DESC LIMIT 30;
